---
title: "Cleaning Kung Fu Data from the 10th WKFC: Scraping, regex, dplyr."
author: Elena Cortina Pino
format: html
---






Data by years:

7th:\

[Reference document](https://www.iwuf.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/7th-World-Kungfu-Championships-Regulations.pdf)

The 7th edition of the competition divided age categories in only 5 groups.



8th:\
[The 8th World Kungfu Championships in Emeishan, China 2019](https://iwuf.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/06/8th-WKFC-Program-Book-International-Group.pdf)

9th:\
[The 8th World Kungfu Championships in Emeishan, China 2023](https://www.iwuf.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/9th-WKFC-Results-Book-境外组.pdf)



##### Variables

<details>

<summary><b>Variable Descriptions</b></summary>

| Variable | Description                                |
|----------|--------------------------------------------|
| Sex      | Sex of athlete                             |
| Form     | Kung fu form the athlete competed in       |
| Rank     | Rank of athlete in the event               |
| Team     | Country the athlete is representing        |
| Athlete  | Athlete's name                             |
| Score    | Numerical score out of 10 possible points  |
| Remark   | Prize awarded based on the score and event |

</details>
